search.query: `cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k component=nxneighbor | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS v4mgmtaddr OUTPUT hostname AS hostnamedest1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port AS v4mgmtaddr OUTPUT hostname AS hostnamedest2| eval hostnamedest = coalesce(hostnamedest1, hostnamedest2)| stats values(component) as component values(v4mgmtaddr) as v4mgmtaddr values(port_id) as port_id by device, hostname, hostnamedest, intf_id | stats values(component) as component, values(device) as device,values(port_id) as "Local Interface" by v4mgmtaddr, intf_id, hostname, hostnamedest | rename intf_id as "Remote Interface" | rename device as "Local Device" | rename v4mgmtaddr as "Remote Device" | stats count by "Local Device","Remote Device","Local Interface","Remote Interface",component, hostname, hostnamedest

html.p: This dashboard contains topology of entire network consists of nexus switches. Each node represents a nexus switch and a link represents a connection between source switch and destination switch. CDP nieghboring information is represented in a graphical way.

Mouse hover/click on a link will give information about Source IP address, Source Interface, Destination IP address, Destination Interface. Mouse hover/click on a node will give information about Switch IP address.
Graph can be dragged and adjusted for better viewing.
